productDisplayName: Ant Kids Boy's Grey Blue Kidswear
description: CompositionBlue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with grey ribbed neckline, grey sleeves, twill tape detailing with studs on the right shoulder and left hem, and with graphic with stud detailing on the left side  FittingComfortWash careWash separately with mild detergentDo not bleachDry flat in shadeDo not iron directly on print or embroideryDry clean preferredBring out the biker in your little one in this cool blue tee from ant. The tattoo graphic on the left with the stud detailing adds a big dose of rocker chic. Team this with denim shorts and cool canvas footwear when you take him out the next time. The soft cotton fabric will keep him feeling fresh and comfortable all day long, while he enjoys those wondrous moments with you in style.
